refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.parameters;
type
The style category, one of the Vtiful\Kernel\Table::STYLE_TYPE_DEFAULT, Vtiful\Kernel\Table::STYLE_TYPE_LIGHT, Vtiful\Kernel\Table::STYLE_TYPE_MEDIUM or Vtiful\Kernel\Table::STYLE_TYPE_DARK constants.
number
The style number within the selected category, used to choose one of the predefined Excel table styles.
&reftitle.returnvalues; Returns the current Vtiful\Kernel\Table instance, allowing method calls to be chained.
